Group recommendation explorer

Real MovieLens-100k · groups from gr.groups.synthetic (similar / divergent / outlier) with consensus-derived interactions · the slider is each member's importance weight (normalised to sum to 100%)

Attribution view

Group recommendations (top 5 of candidates)

Number = the item's group score (0–1) for score-based methods, or its rank for the selection-based fair aggregator · dots = each user's share of that item's relevance (hover for %) · amber ✓ = a consensus item the group liked

Aggregate user contribution across the top 5
